title: bouea burmanica var. microphylla
intro: Bouea burmanica var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaf bouea, is a plant species that belongs to the Annonaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bouea burmanica var. microphylla include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
